So, in Python, the code would be something like:

def split_lowerstring(s):
    # Find all indices where the character is lowercase
    lower_indices = [i for i, c in enumerate(s) if c.islower()]
    if not lower_indices:
        return []
    # The parts are the substrings between each pair of consecutive indices
    parts = []
    for i in range(1, len(lower_indices)):
        parts.append(s[lower_indices[i-1]:lower_indices[i]])
    # Add the last part from the last index to the end
    parts.append(s[lower_indices[-1]:])
    return parts

arguments.code:
def split_lowerstring(s):
    lower_indices = [i for i, c in enumerate(s) if c.islower()]
    if not lower_indices:
        return []
    parts = []
    for i in range(1, len(lower_indices)):
        parts.append(s[lower_indices[i-1]:lower_indices[i]])
    parts.append(s[lower_indices[-1]:])
    return parts

# Test cases
assert split_lowerstring('AbCd') == ['bC','d']
assert split_lowerstring('Python') == ['y','t','h','o','n']
assert split_lowerstring('Programming') == ['r','o','g','r','a','m','m','i','n','g']

arguments.code:
def split_lowerstring(s):
    lower_indices = [i for i, c in enumerate(s) if c.islower()]
    if not lower_indices:
        return []
    parts = []
    for i in range(1, len(lower_indices)):
        parts.append(s[lower_indices[i-1]:lower_indices[i]])
    parts.append(s[lower_indices[-1]:])
    return parts

# Test cases
assert split_lowerstring('AbCd') == ['bC','d']
assert split_lowerstring('Python') == ['y','t','h','o','n']
assert split_lowerstring('Programming') == ['r','o','g','r','a','m','m','i','n','g']

arguments.answer:
def split_lowerstring(s):
    lower_indices = [i for i, c in enumerate(s) if c.islower()]
    if not lower_indices:
        return []
    parts = []
    for i in range(1, len(lower_indices)):
        parts.append(s[lower_indices[i-1]:lower_indices[i]])
    parts.append(s[lower_indices[-1]:])
    return parts

# Test cases
assert split_lowerstring('AbCd') == ['bC','d']
assert split_lowerstring('Python') == ['y','t','h','o','n']
assert split_lowerstring('Programming') == ['r','o','g','r','a','m','m','i','n','g']
